prompt: {"type":"anime storyboard collage","style":"cinematic slice-of-life anime illustration with soft realistic lighting, polished painterly detail, shallow depth of field, and gentle filmic glow","subject":{"character":"middle school girl with sleepy half-lidded eyes and a mildly grumpy expression","hair":{"color":"black","style":"straight blunt bangs, very long side locks framing the face, low bun at the back"},"outfit":{"count":4,"items":["white sailor school uniform top","navy sailor collar and necktie","dark pleated skirt","dark backpack"]},"mood":"quiet morning commute, introspective, deadpan, slightly moody but charming"},"layout":{"grid":{"rows":3,"columns":3,"count":9},"panels":[{"position":"top-left","description":"close side-profile portrait indoors by a bright window, upper body visible, warm morning backlight, cherry blossom petals and greenery outside"},{"position":"top-center","description":"medium side view at the doorway or entrance area, character turned left, backpack visible, spring sunlight streaming in from outside"},{"position":"top-right","description":"close portrait turning her head toward the viewer with a flat unimpressed stare, strong rim light through trees, circular lens flare bokeh"},{"position":"middle-left","description":"full-body shot on a train platform beside a silver commuter train with a yellow stripe, character standing alone and waiting"},{"position":"middle-center","description":"close side-profile seated or standing by a train window, cool blue interior light mixed with sunlit exterior blur"},{"position":"middle-right","description":"rear full-body shot of the girl walking downhill on a narrow residential path with railings, dappled sunlight and leafy shadows, townscape in the distance"},{"position":"bottom-left","description":"close three-quarter portrait framed by green leaves in the foreground, bright sun filtering through foliage, soft glowing bokeh"},{"position":"bottom-center","description":"low-angle medium shot outdoors against a blue sky and urban building, backpack strap visible, expression unchanged and stoic"},{"position":"bottom-right","description":"rear full-body shot standing at an overlook or fenced walkway above the neighborhood, bright clear sky, trees framing the scene"}]},"environment":{"season":"spring or early summer","setting":"Japanese suburban school commute","elements":{"count":8,"items":["sunlit window","trees and greenery","floating petals or dust motes","commuter train","platform roof","sloped residential street","metal railings","distant low-rise cityscape"]}},"lighting":{"time":"early morning","qualities":{"count":5,"items":["golden-hour sunlight","strong backlighting","rim light on hair and shoulders","soft lens flare","dappled leaf shadows"]}},"composition":"consistent character design across all 9 panels, storyboard feel, vertical smartphone-friendly collage, black borders separating panels, each panel capturing a different beat of her commute to school","quality":"highly detailed, emotionally evocative, clean anime linework, natural color grading"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"动漫分镜拼贴","style":"电影感日常系动漫插画，具有柔和写实的灯光、精致的绘画细节、浅景深和轻微的电影质感光晕","subject":{"character":"有着困倦半睁眼和略带不悦表情的中学生","hair":{"color":"黑色","style":"直发齐刘海，脸颊两侧有很长的鬓角，后脑勺扎着低发髻"},"outfit":{"count":4,"items":["白色水手服上衣","海军蓝水手领和领带","深色百褶裙","深色书包"]},"mood":"安静的早晨通勤，内省，面无表情，略带忧郁但充满魅力"},"layout":{"grid":{"rows":3,"columns":3,"count":9},"panels":[{"position":"左上","description":"室内明亮窗边的侧脸特写，可见上半身，温暖的晨间逆光，窗外有樱花花瓣和绿植"},{"position":"中上","description":"门口或入口处的侧面中景，角色向左转，可见书包，春日的阳光从外面射入"},{"position":"右上","description":"转头看向观众的特写，表情平淡且不为所动，强烈的轮廓光穿过树木，带有圆形镜头光晕散景"},{"position":"左中","description":"在带有黄色条纹的银色通勤列车旁，站台上的全身镜头，角色独自一人在等待"},{"position":"正中","description":"坐在或站在列车窗边的侧脸特写，冷色调的室内光与阳光照射下的模糊室外背景交融"},{"position":"右中","description":"女孩走在带有栏杆的狭窄住宅小路上的背部全身镜头，斑驳的阳光和树叶阴影，远处可见城镇景观"},{"position":"左下","description":"前景被绿叶框住的四分之三侧脸特写，明亮的阳光透过叶片，柔和的散景光晕"},{"position":"中下","description":"以蓝天和城市建筑为背景的户外低角度中景，可见书包带，表情依旧冷淡"},{"position":"右下","description":"站在邻里上方观景台或围栏走道上的背部全身镜头，天空明亮清澈，树木勾勒出场景轮廓"}]},"environment":{"season":"春季或初夏","setting":"日本郊区校园通勤","elements":{"count":8,"items":["阳光明媚的窗户","树木和绿植","漂浮的花瓣或尘埃","通勤列车","站台顶棚","倾斜的住宅街道","金属栏杆","远处的低层城市景观"]}},"lighting":{"time":"清晨","qualities":{"count":5,"items":["黄金时刻的阳光","强烈的逆光","头发和肩膀上的轮廓光","柔和的镜头光晕","斑驳的叶影"]}},"composition":"9 个分镜中保持一致的角色设计，分镜感，适合手机屏幕的竖向拼贴，黑色边框分隔分镜，每个分镜捕捉她上学通勤路上的不同瞬间","quality":"高度细节化，情感动人，干净的动漫线条，自然的色彩分级"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫校园通勤分镜网格：一个九宫格动漫分镜拼贴，展示了一位面无表情的女学生在早晨通勤时的场景，非常适合以角色为导向的日常系视觉叙事。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, grid, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, backlight, shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
